idea-plugin.name: Breeze Dev Helper
idea-plugin.description:
Breeze Dev Helper keeps specification documents and source code linked. During development, you can jump bidirectionally between Markdown documents and Java/Kotlin/Scala source code to quickly confirm which code implements which requirement.

📄 Jump to Document (Code Comment → Markdown)

Write @spec <path>.md in a Java, Kotlin, or Scala comment, then press Ctrl/Cmd+B or Ctrl/Cmd+Click on the path to jump directly to the corresponding Markdown document.

🔗 Jump to Code (Markdown → Source Code)

Place a spec-jump:// link in your Markdown file, then press Ctrl/Cmd+B, Ctrl/Cmd+Click, or click the link in the preview panel to navigate to the specified location in Java/Kotlin/Scala source code.

Supported link formats:

  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass – jump to class
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass#myMethod – jump to method or field
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass:42 – jump to line number
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass#myMethod:42 – method + line offset

⚙️ Customizable Settings

Both keywords can be customized in Settings → Tools → Breeze Dev Helper:

  • Comment Keyword – default @spec
  • Link Protocol Prefix – default spec-jump://
